title: atalantia mindanaensis
intro: Atalantia mindanaensis, also known as the Mindanao Atalantia or Atalantia fruit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Atalantia mindanaensis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection. Atalantia mindanaensis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusion, or decoction, to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
